title: [OBSELETE] Beyou!
description: A resource pack for the Blahaj mod
body:
> No longer needed! Little individual's [now available in the mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcr_blahaj)!

A resource pack for the [Blahaj mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcr_blahaj) that replaces Klappar with Beyou

The icon used for this resource pack is by [Heatherhorns](https://heatherhorns.com/emoji/), and is licensed under the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License.
